ai.notes: The form uses custom button-based radio inputs that toggle hidden checkboxes. The resume and cover letter fields support drag-and-drop and file selection.

fields.question: Are you legally eligible now or in the future, to work for any employer in the US without sponsorship at any time?
Do you currently live in the United States?
What state and city do you currently live in?

At Amplitude, we value the power of in-person collaboration to fuel our culture, creativity, and team engagement. All full-time employees residing within a two-hour commute distance of an Amplitude office are expected to work from the office 1 to 3 days per week. Do you understand and agree to adhere to this hybrid in-office expectation if you reside within a commutable distance of an Amplitude hub?
Do you have 7+ years of professional software engineering experience building robust, scalable backends as well as interactive, user-facing applications?
Do you have professional experience moving fast, shipping iteratively, and taking full A-to-Z technical ownership of projects in a startup or mid-sized company environment?

To maintain the reliability of our flagship analytics platform, this role participates in a 24/7 on-call rotation for 1 week every 9 weeks (paging after-hours for Severity 1 issues only). Are you willing and able to participate in this team rotation?
